subcodes.first_line: O thou stranger in the path of God! We have dispatched unto thee this garment that thou mayest inhale therefrom the fragrance of reunion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الغریب فی سبیل الله قد ارسلنا الیک هذا القمیص لتجد منه نفحه الوصال
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
